{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2012
|other_titles    = Copa Kia do Brasil 2012
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = March 7 - July 11
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
|runner-up       = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
|matches         = 112
|goals           = 319
|top goal scorer = {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Luís Fabiano]] ([[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]) (8 goals)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2011 Copa do Brasil|2011]]
|nextseason      = [[2013 Copa do Brasil|2013]]
}}

The '''2012 Copa do Brasil''' (officially the '''Copa Kia do Brasil 2012''' for sponsorship reasons) was the 24th edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. It began on March 7 and ended on July 11. The competition was contested by 64 teams, either qualified through their respective state championships (54) or by the [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF Rankings]] (10). Clubs that qualify for the [[2012 Copa Libertadores]] (like the [[2011 Copa do Brasil|current champion]], [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]) did not take part because of scheduling conflicts.

The cup winner qualifies for the [[2013 Copa Libertadores]].
{{TOC left|limit=2}}
{{clear}}

==Format==
The competition is a [[single elimination]] [[knockout tournament]] featuring [[two-legged tie]]s. In the first two rounds, if the away team wins the first match by 2 or more goals, it progresses straight to the next round avoiding the second leg. The [[away goals rule]] is also used in the Copa do Brasil. The winner qualifies for the [[2013 Copa Libertadores]], which prevents a team from winning the Copa do Brasil twice in a row.

==Qualified teams==

===Qualified by state championships and other competitions===
54 spots in the tournament are destinated to all the 27 State federations to indicate either one, two or three clubs, depending on their status in [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]] State ranking.<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://www2.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking_uf.pdf |title=CBF State Ranking - official site |access-date=February 1, 2011 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20091014095018/http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking_uf.pdf |archive-date=October 14, 2009 |url-status=dead |df=mdy-all }}</ref> Criteria may vary, but usually state federations indicate clubs with best records in the state championships or other special competitions organized by such institutions.

Teams in italics may qualify for the Copa Libertadores.

{| class="wikitable"
|- 
!|State
!|Team
!Qualification method
|-
||{{flagicon|Acre}} [[Acre (state)|Acre]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Acreano]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Alagoas]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Associação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Alagoano]] champions
|-
|[[Coruripe]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Alagoano]] runners-up
|-
||{{flagicon|Amapá}} [[Amapá]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|[[Trem Desportivo Clube|Trem]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Amapaense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Amazonas (Brazilian state)|Amazonas]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Penarol Atlético Clube|Penarol]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Amazonense]] champions
|-
|[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Amazonense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Bahia]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Associação Desportiva Bahia de Feira|Bahia de Feira]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Baiano]] champions
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Baiano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Cearense]] champions
|-
|[[Horizonte]]
|[[2011 Copa Fares Lopes]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Federal District (Brazil)|Distrito Federal]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Brasiliense]] champions
|-
|[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Brasiliense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Espírito Santo]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Centro Educativo Recreativo Associação Atlética São Mateus|São Mateus]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Capixaba]] champions
|-
|[[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]]
|[[2011 Copa Espírito Santo]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Goiás]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético-GO]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Goiano]] champions
|-
|[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Goiano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Maranhão]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Santa Quitéria Futebol Clube|Santa Quitéria]]
|[[2011 Copa União do Maranhão]] champions
|-
|[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Maranhense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Mato Grosso]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Cuiabá Esporte Clube|Cuiabá]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|[[Luverdense Esporte Clube|Luverdense]]
|[[2011 Copa Governador do Mato Grosso]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Mato Grosso do Sul]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Clube Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|[[Aquidauanense Futebol Clube|Aquidauanense]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Minas Gerais]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Mineiro]] champions 
|-
|[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Mineiro]] runners-up
|-
|[[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga]]
|[[2011 Taça Minas Gerais]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Pará}} [[Pará]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Independente Atlético Clube (Tucuruí)|Independente]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paraense]] champions
|-
|[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paraense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Paraíba]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paraibano]] champions
|-
|[[Auto Esporte Clube|Auto Esporte]]
|[[2011 Copa Paraíba]] champions
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Paraná (state)|Paraná]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Coritiba]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paranaense]] champions
|-
|[[Atlético Paranaense]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paranaense]] runners-up
|-
|[[Operário Ferroviário Esporte Clube|Operário]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paranaense]] 3rd place
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Pernambuco]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Pernambucano]] champions
|-
|[[Sport]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Pernambucano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Piauí]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[4 de Julho Esporte Clube|4 de Julho]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Piauiense]] champions
|-
| [[Comercial Atlético Clube|Comercial]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Piauiense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Rio de Janeiro (state)|Rio de Janeiro]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Carioca]] 3rd 
|-
| [[Boavista Sport Club|Boavista]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Carioca]] 4th
|-
|[[Madureira Esporte Clube|Madureira]]
|[[2011 Copa Rio]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Rio Grande do Norte]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Potiguar]] champions
|-
|[[Sport Club Santa Cruz|Santa Cruz]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Potiguar]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Rio Grande do Sul]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Grêmio Football Porto-Alegrense|Grêmio]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Gaúcho]] runners-up
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Gaúcho]] 3rd
|-
|[[Grêmio Esportivo Sapucaiense|Sapucaiense]]
|[[2010 Copa FGF]] 3rd
|-
||{{flagicon|Rondônia}} [[Rondônia]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|[[Espigão Esporte Clube|Espigão]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Rondoniense]] champions
|-
||{{flagicon|Roraima}} [[Roraima]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|[[Associação Esportiva Real|Real]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Roraimense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo (state)|São Paulo]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paulista]] 3rd
|-
|[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Paulista]] 4th
|-
|[[Paulista Futebol Clube|Paulista]]
|[[2011 Copa Paulista]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Santa Catarina (state)|Santa Catarina]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Chapecoense]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Catarinense]] champions
|-
|[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Catarinense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Sergipe]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Sociedade Esportiva River Plate|River Plate]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Sergipano]] champions
|-
|[[São Domingos Futebol Clube|São Domingos]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Sergipano]] runners-up
|-
||{{flagicon|Tocantins}} [[Tocantins (state)|Tocantins]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|[[Gurupi Esporte Clube|Gurupi]]
|[[2011 Campeonato Tocantinense]] champions
|}

<!-- 
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------empty version---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
{| class="wikitable"
|- 
!width=100|State
!width=200|Team
!Qualification method
|-
|rowspan="1"|{{flagicon|Acre}} [[Acre (state)|Acre]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Acreano]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Alagoas]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Alagoano]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Alagoano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="1"|{{flagicon|Amapá}} [[Amapá]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Amapaense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Amazonas (Brazilian state)|Amazonas]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Amazonense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Amazonense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Bahia]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Baiano]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Baiano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Cearense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2010 Copa Fares Lopes]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Federal District (Brazil)|Distrito Federal]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Brasiliense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Brasiliense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Espírito Santo]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Capixaba]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Espírito Santo]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Goiás]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Goiano]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Goiano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Maranhão]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|[[Instituto de Administração de Projetos Educacionais Futebol Clube|IAPE]]
|[[2010 Copa União do Maranhão]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Maranhense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Mato Grosso]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Governador do Mato Grosso]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Mato Grosso do Sul]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Minas Gerais]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Mineiro]] champions 
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Mineiro]] runners-up
|-
|
|[[2011 Taça Minas Gerais]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Pará}} [[Pará]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paraense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paraense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Paraíba]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paraibano]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Paraíba]] champions
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Paraná (state)|Paraná]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paranaense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paranaense]] runners-up
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paranaense]] 3rd place
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Pernambuco]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Pernambucano]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Pernambucano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Piauí]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Piauiense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Piauí]] champions
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Rio de Janeiro (state)|Rio de Janeiro]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Carioca]] champions 
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Carioca]] runners-up
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Rio]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Rio Grande do Norte]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Potiguar]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Potiguar]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Rio Grande do Sul]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Gaúcho]] 
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Gaúcho]] 
|-
|
|[[2010 Copa FGF]] 
|-
|rowspan="1"|{{flagicon|Rondônia}} [[Rondônia]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|
|[[2010 Campeonato Rondoniense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="1"|{{flagicon|Roraima}} [[Roraima]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Roraimense]] champions
|-
|rowspan="3"|{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo (state)|São Paulo]]<br /><small>3 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paulista]] champion
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Paulista]] runners-up
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Paulista]] champions
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Santa Catarina (state)|Santa Catarina]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
| 
|[[2011 Campeonato Catarinense]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Catarinense]] runners-up-up
|-
|rowspan="2"|{{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Sergipe]]<br /><small>2 berths</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Sergipano]] champions
|-
|
|[[2011 Copa Governo de Sergipe]] champions
|-
|rowspan="1"|{{flagicon|Tocantins}} [[Tocantins (state)|Tocantins]]<br /><small>1 berth</small>
|
|[[2011 Campeonato Tocantinense]] champions
|}
-->

===Qualified by CBF club ranking===
Ten spots are reserved for the top 10 clubs in [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]] club ranking, excluding those qualified by state competitions and clubs playing in [[2012 Copa Libertadores]].

{| class="wikitable sortable"
|-
! style="width:5%;"|Pos.
! style="width:10%;"|Club
! style="width:5%;"|State
! style="width:6%;"|Points (2010)
! style="width:4%;"|{{Tooltip| [[#CP|CP]]|Copa do Brasil points}} 
! style="width:4%;"|{{Tooltip| [[#LP|LP]]|League points}} 
! style="width:4%;"|{{Tooltip| [[#PP|PP]]|Position points}} 
! style="width:6%;"|Current points
! style="width:6%;"|Maximum points 
! style="width:8%;"|Qualification Status
! style="width:12%;"|Notes

<!--
<sup>[[#COPA|Note Copa do Brasil]]</sup
<sup>[[#LIB|Note Libertadores]]</sup>
<sup>[[#SA|Note Serie A]]</sup>
-->
|- style="background:#97deff;"
|'''1''' 
| [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] || {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} RS || 2.159 ||0||41||TBD||'''2.200'''||2.219||(SQ)|| 
|- style="background:#fcc;"
| '''2''' 
|| [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP || 2.137||0||41||TBD||'''2.178'''||2.197||(DQ) ||''' <sup> [[#SA|Note Serie A]]</sup>'''
|- style="background:#fcc;"
| '''3''' 
|| [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] || {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} RJ || 2.086||30||41||TBD||'''2.157'''||2.176||(DQ) ||'''<sup>[[#COPA|Note Copa do Brasil]]</sup>'''
|- style="background:#fcc;"
| '''4''' 
|| [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] || {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} RJ || 2.086||5||41||TBD||'''2.132'''||2.151||(DQ) ||''' <sup> [[#SA|Note Serie A]]</sup>'''
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''5''' 
|| [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP || 2.049||4||41||TBD||'''2.095'''||2.114||(SQ)||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''6''' 
|| [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] || {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} MG || 2.032||2||41||TBD||'''2.075'''||2.094|| (SQ)||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''7''' 
|| [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP  || 2.012||5||41||TBD||'''2.058'''||2.177||(SQ)||
|- style="background:#fcc;"
| '''8''' 
|| [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] || {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} RS || 1.996||0||41||TBD||'''2.037'''||2.056||(DQ)|| ''' <sup> [[#SA|Note Serie A]]</sup>'''
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''9''' 
|| [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] || {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} MG || 1.950 ||0||41||TBD||'''1.991'''||2.010||(SQ)  ||
|- style="background:#fcc;"
| '''10''' 
|| [[Santos FC|Santos]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP || 1.829||0||41||TBD||'''1.870'''||1.889|| (DQ)  ||'''<sup> [[#LIB|Note Copa Libertadores]]</sup>'''
|- style="background:#fcc;"
| '''11''' 
|| [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]] || {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} RJ || 1.723||0||41||TBD||'''1.764'''||1.783|| (DQ) ||'''<sup> [[#SA|Note Serie A]]</sup>'''
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''12''' 
|| [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] || {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} RJ || 1.672||3||41||TBD||'''1.716'''||1.735||(SQ)||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''13''' 
|| [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] || {{flagicon|Paraná}} PR || 1.515||20||41||TBD||'''1.576'''||1.595||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''14''' 
|| [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]] || {{flagicon|Goiás}} GO || 1.523||3||21||TBD||'''1.547'''||1.566||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''15''' 
|| [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP || 1.516||2||21||TBD||'''1.539'''||1.558||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''16''' 
|| [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]] || {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} PE || 1.501||1||21||TBD||'''1.523'''||1.542||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''17''' 
|| [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP || 1.405||1||21||19||'''1.446'''||1.446||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''18''' 
|| [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] || {{flagicon|Paraná}} PR || 1.379||5||41||TBD||'''1.425'''||1.444||(SQ)||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''19''' 
|| [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] || {{flagicon|Bahia}} BA || 1.358||3||41||TBD||'''1.402'''||1.421||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''20''' 
|| [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]] || {{flagicon|Bahia}} BA || 1.355||1||21||TBD||'''1.357'''||1.396||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''21''' 
|| [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] || {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} PE || 1.207||3||21||TBD||'''1.231'''||1.277||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''22''' 
|| [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]] || {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} PE || 1.140||2||1||TBD||'''1.143'''||1.152||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''23''' 
|| [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]] || {{flagicon|Paraná}}  PR || 1.080||2||21||TBD||'''1.103'''||1.132||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''24''' 
|| [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] || {{flagicon|Ceará}}  CE || 1.055||10||41||TBD||'''1.106'''||1.125||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''25''' 
|| [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP || 1.047||2||21||TBD||'''1.070'''||1.089||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''26''' 
|| [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]] || {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} RS || 0.867||0||1||TBD||'''0.868'''||0.877||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''27''' 
|| [[Clube do Remo|Remo]] || {{flagicon|Pará}}  PA || 0.855||0||0||TBD||'''0.855'''||0.865||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''28''' 
|| [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] || {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} SC || 0.706||0||21||TBD||'''0.727'''||0.746||(SQ) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''28''' 
|| [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]] || {{flagicon|Ceará}} CE || 0.724||2||1||TBD||'''0.727'''||0.746||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''29''' 
|| [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]] || {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}}RN || 0.725||0||1||TBD||'''0.726'''||0.745||(Q) ||
|- style="background:#97deff;"
| '''31''' 
|| [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]] || {{flagicon|Pará}} PA || 0.672||2||1||TBD||'''0.675'''||0.794||(SQ)||
|- style="background:#ace1af;"
| '''32''' 
|| [[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]] || {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} MG || 0.614||0||41||1||'''0.656'''||0.656||(Q)||
|-
| '''32''' 
|| [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense]] || {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} SC || 0.601||0||41||13||'''0.655'''||0.656||(I)
<!--
|-
| '''33º''' 
|| Londrina || {{flagicon|Paraná}} PR || 0.631||0||0||0||'''0.631'''||(I)||
|-
| '''35º''' 
|| Joinville || {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} SC || 0.589 max 0.629
|-
| '''36º''' 
|| CRB || {{flagicon|Alagoas}} AL || 0.580 max 0.600
|-
| '''37º''' 
|| Bragantino || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP   || 0.566 max 0.606
|-
| '''38º''' 
|| Botafogo-SP || {{flagicon|São Paulo}} SP  || 0.555
|-
| '''39º''' 
|| Avai || {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} SC || 0.540
|-
| '''40º''' 
|| [[Operário Futebol Clube|Operário]] || {{BR-MSb}} MS || 0.532
-->
|}
'''Symbols''':

<span id="CP"></span>'''CP''': Points for [[2011 Copa do Brasil]] (1st round 1 pt, 2nd round 2 pts, 3rd round 3 pts, quarterfinals 5 pts, semifinals 10 pts, runners-up 20 pts, winner 30 pts) <span id="LP"></span>'''LP''': Minimum points for Campeonato Brasileiro (41 for Série A,21 for Série B, 1 for Série C and D)<span id="PP"></span>'''PP''': Additional points for position (Série A and B: 1st 19 points, ..., 20th 0 Points; Série C: 1st 19 points, ..., 10th 10 points, 11th-20th 0 point, Série D: 1st 9 points,...9th 1 Point)    
'''(Q)''' Qualified via ranking; '''(TQ)''' Qualified via ranking or via state competition; '''(SQ)''' Qualified via state competition; '''(E)''' Eligible for qualification via state competition; '''(I)''' Ineligible for qualification via state competition; '''(DQ)''' Ineligible because qualified for [[2012 Copa Libertadores|Copa Libertadores]].   <br />
'''Notes:'''
*<span id="LIB"></span> [[Santos FC|Santos]] qualified for [[2012 Copa Libertadores]] via [[2011 Copa Libertadores]].
*<span id="COPA"></span> [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] qualified for [[2012 Copa Libertadores]] via [[2011 Copa do Brasil]].
*<span id="SA"></span> [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]], [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]], [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] and [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] qualified for [[2012 Copa Libertadores]] via [[2011 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]].

==Bracket==
Teams that play in their home stadium in the first leg are marked with †.
{{64TeamBracket|legs=2
| seeds = no
| compact = yes
| compact-final = yes
| nowrap = yes
|RD1=[[#First phase|First Phase]]
|RD2=[[#Second phase|Second Phase]]
|RD3=[[#Round of 16|Round of 16]]
|RD4=[[#Quarterfinals|Quarterfinals]]
|RD5=[[#Semifinals|Semifinals]]
|RD6=[[#Finals|Finals]]
<!-- First Round -->
| RD1-team01 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]''' | RD1-team02 = {{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Associação Atlética Coruripe|Coruripe]] †
| RD1-score01-1 = 1 | RD1-score02-1 = 0
| RD1-score01-2 = 3 | RD1-score02-2 = 0

| RD1-team03 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]] †| RD1-team04 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Horizonte Futebol Clube|Horizonte]]''' †
| RD1-score03-1 = 0 | RD1-score04-1 = 2
| RD1-score03-2 = 2 (2) | RD1-score04-2 = 0 (4)

| RD1-team05 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]'''| RD1-team06 = {{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama]]''' †
| RD1-score05-1 = 2 | RD1-score06-1 = 0
| RD1-score05-2 = - | RD1-score06-2 = -

| RD1-team07 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]'''| RD1-team08 = {{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Luverdense Esporte Clube|Luverdense]] †
| RD1-score07-1 = 2 | RD1-score08-1 = 2
| RD1-score07-2 = 2 | RD1-score08-2 = 0

| RD1-team09 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]''' | RD1-team10 = {{flagicon|Acre}} [[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]] †
| RD1-score09-1 = 6 | RD1-score10-1 = 0
| RD1-score09-2 = - | RD1-score10-2 = -

| RD1-team11 = {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]]''' | RD1-team12 = {{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Centro Educativo Recreativo Associação Atlética São Mateus|São Mateus]] †
| RD1-score11-1 = 1 | RD1-score12-1 = 2
| RD1-score11-2 = 3 | RD1-score12-2 = 1

| RD1-team13 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]''' | RD1-team14 = {{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]] †
| RD1-score13-1 = 1| RD1-score14-1 = 2
| RD1-score13-2 = 1| RD1-score14-2 = 0

| RD1-team15 = {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]''' | RD1-team16 = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Madureira Esporte Clube|Madureira]] †
| RD1-score15-1 = 2| RD1-score16-1 = 0
| RD1-score15-2 = - | RD1-score16-2 = -

| RD1-team17 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]''' | RD1-team18 = {{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Sociedade Esportiva River Plate|River Plate]] †
| RD1-score17-1 = 3 | RD1-score18-1 = 2
| RD1-score17-2 = 3 | RD1-score18-2 = 1

| RD1-team19 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga]]''' | RD1-team20 = {{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]] †
| RD1-score19-1 = 2 | RD1-score20-1 = 0
| RD1-score19-2 = - | RD1-score20-2 = -

| RD1-team21 = {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]''' | RD1-team22 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Sport Club Santa Cruz|Santa Cruz-RN]] †
| RD1-score21-1 = 3 | RD1-score22-1 = 1
| RD1-score21-2 = - | RD1-score22-2 = -

| RD1-team23 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]''' | RD1-team24 = {{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Comercial Atlético Clube|Comercial-PI]] †
| RD1-score23-1 = 3 | RD1-score24-1 = 2
| RD1-score23-2 = 3 | RD1-score24-2 = 0

| RD1-team25 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]''' | RD1-team26 = {{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Auto Esporte Clube|Auto Esporte-PB]] † 
| RD1-score25-1 = 3 | RD1-score26-1 = 0
| RD1-score25-2 = - | RD1-score26-2 = -

| RD1-team27 = {{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Clube do Remo|Remo]]''' | RD1-team28 = {{flagicon|Roraima}} [[Associação Esportiva Real|Real]] † 
| RD1-score27-1 = 0 | RD1-score28-1 = 0
| RD1-score27-2 = 3 | RD1-score28-2 = 0

| RD1-team29 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]''' | RD1-team30 = {{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Cuiabá Esporte Clube|Cuiabá]] † 
| RD1-score29-1 = 1 | RD1-score30-1 = 1
| RD1-score29-2 = 4 | RD1-score30-2 = 0

| RD1-team31 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]''' | RD1-team32 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Operário Ferroviário Esporte Clube|Operário-PR]] †
| RD1-score31-1 = 4 | RD1-score32-1 = 0
| RD1-score31-2 = - | RD1-score32-2 = -

| RD1-team33 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]''' | RD1-team34 = {{flagicon|Pará}} [[Independente Atlético Clube (PA)|Independente]] †
| RD1-score33-1 = 1 | RD1-score34-1 = 0
| RD1-score33-2 = 4 | RD1-score34-2 = 0

| RD1-team35 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Associação Desportiva Bahia de Feira|Bahia de Feira]]''' | RD1-team36 = {{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Aquidauanense Futebol Clube|Aquidauanense]] †
| RD1-score35-1 = 0 | RD1-score36-1 = 1
| RD1-score35-2 = 2 | RD1-score36-2 = 0

| RD1-team37 = {{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]''' | RD1-team38 = {{flagicon|Tocantins}} [[Gurupi Esporte Clube|Gurupi]] †
| RD1-score37-1 = 1 | RD1-score38-1 = 0
| RD1-score37-2 = 4 | RD1-score38-2 = 2

| RD1-team39 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]''' | RD1-team40 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Esportivo Sapucaiense|Sapucaiense]] †
| RD1-score39-1 = 0 | RD1-score40-1 = 0
| RD1-score39-2 = 5 | RD1-score40-2 = 2

| RD1-team41 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]''' | RD1-team42 = {{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Clube Esportivo Nova Esperança|CENE]] †
| RD1-score41-1 = 3 | RD1-score42-1 = 1
| RD1-score41-2 = - | RD1-score42-2 = -

| RD1-team43 = {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]] | RD1-team44 = {{flagicon|Amazonas}} '''[[Penarol Atlético Clube|Penarol]]''' †
| RD1-score43-1 = 2 | RD1-score44-1 = 2
| RD1-score43-2 = 1 | RD1-score44-2 = 2

| RD1-team45 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]''' | RD1-team46 = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Boavista Sport Club|Boavista]] †
| RD1-score45-1 = 0 | RD1-score46-1 = 0
| RD1-score45-2 = 2 | RD1-score46-2 = 1

| RD1-team47 = {{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]''' | RD1-team48 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Paulista Futebol Clube|Paulista]] †
| RD1-score47-1 = 3 | RD1-score48-1 = 2
| RD1-score47-2 = 3 | RD1-score48-2 = 0

| RD1-team49 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]''' | RD1-team50 = {{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional]] †
| RD1-score49-1 = 0 | RD1-score50-1 = 0
| RD1-score49-2 = 2 | RD1-score50-2 = 0

| RD1-team51 = {{flagicon|Alagoas}} '''[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]]''' | RD1-team52 = {{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Santa Quitéria Futebol Clube|Santa Quitéria]] †
| RD1-score51-1 = 3 | RD1-score52-1 = 2
| RD1-score51-2 = 2 | RD1-score52-2 = 1

| RD1-team53 = {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]'''| RD1-team54 = {{flagicon|Piauí}} [[4 de Julho Esporte Clube|4 de Julho]] †
| RD1-score53-1 = 2 | RD1-score54-1 = 0
| RD1-score53-2 = - | RD1-score54-2 = -

| RD1-team55 = {{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]''' | RD1-team56 = {{flagicon|Rondônia}} [[Esporte Clube Espigão|Espigão]] †
| RD1-score55-1 = 3 | RD1-score56-1 = 1
| RD1-score55-2 = - | RD1-score56-2 = -

| RD1-team57 = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]''' | RD1-team58 = {{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze]] †
| RD1-score57-1 = 1 | RD1-score58-1 = 1
| RD1-score57-2 = 1 (3) | RD1-score58-2 = 1 (2)

| RD1-team59 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]]''' | RD1-team60 = {{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]] †
| RD1-score59-1 = 0 | RD1-score60-1 = 2
| RD1-score59-2 = 3 | RD1-score60-2 = 0

| RD1-team61 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' | RD1-team62 = {{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[São Domingos Futebol Clube|São Domingos]] †
| RD1-score61-1 = 0 | RD1-score62-1 = 0
| RD1-score61-2 =  2| RD1-score62-2 = 0

| RD1-team63 =  {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} '''[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]'''| RD1-team64 = {{flagicon|Amapá}} [[Trem Desportivo Clube|Trem]] †
| RD1-score63-1 = 5 | RD1-score64-1 = 0
| RD1-score63-2 = - | RD1-score64-2 = -

<!-- Second Round -->
| RD2-team01 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]''' | RD2-team02 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Horizonte Futebol Clube|Horizonte]] †
| RD2-score01-1 = 3 | RD2-score02-1 = 1
| RD2-score01-2 = - | RD2-score02-2 = -

| RD2-team03 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] † | RD2-team04 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]'''
| RD2-score03-1 = 2 | RD2-score04-1 = 2
| RD2-score03-2 = 1 | RD2-score04-2 = 1

| RD2-team05 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]''' | RD2-team06 = {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]] †
| RD2-score05-1 = 1 | RD2-score06-1 = 1
| RD2-score05-2 = 4 | RD2-score06-2 = 1

| RD2-team07 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]''' | RD2-team08 = {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] †
| RD2-score07-1 = 2 | RD2-score08-1 = 1
| RD2-score07-2 = 5 | RD2-score08-2 = 1

| RD2-team09 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]''' | RD2-team10 ={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Ipatinga Futebol Clube|Ipatinga]] †
| RD2-score09-1 = 1 | RD2-score10-1 = 0
| RD2-score09-2 = 3 | RD2-score10-2 = 0

| RD2-team11 = {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] | RD2-team12 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]''' †
| RD2-score11-1 = 0 | RD2-score12-1 = 4
| RD2-score11-2 = 2 | RD2-score12-2 = 1

| RD2-team13 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]''' | RD2-team14 = {{flagicon|Pará}} [[Clube do Remo|Remo]] †
| RD2-score13-1 = 1 | RD2-score14-1 = 2
| RD2-score13-2 = 4 | RD2-score14-2 = 0

| RD2-team15 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]''' | RD2-team16 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]''' †
| RD2-score15-1 = 0 | RD2-score16-1 = 2
| RD2-score15-2 = 4 | RD2-score16-2 = 0

| RD2-team17 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]''' | RD2-team18 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Associação Desportiva Bahia de Feira|Bahia de Feira]] †
| RD2-score17-1 = 5 | RD2-score18-1 = 2
| RD2-score17-2 =- | RD2-score18-2 = -

| RD2-team19 = {{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]] † | RD2-team20 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]''' †
| RD2-score19-1 = 2 | RD2-score20-1 = 1
| RD2-score19-2 = 1 (3) | RD2-score20-2 = 2 (4)

| RD2-team21 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''| RD2-team22 = {{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Penarol Atlético Clube|Penarol]] †
| RD2-score21-1 = 5 | RD2-score22-1 = 0
| RD2-score21-2 = - | RD2-score22-2 = -

| RD2-team23 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]''' †| RD2-team24 = {{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]'''
| RD2-score23-1 = 0 | RD2-score24-1 = 0
| RD2-score23-2 = 3 | RD2-score24-2 = 4

| RD2-team25 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]''' | RD2-team26 = {{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]] †
| RD2-score25-1 = 0 | RD2-score26-1 = 1
| RD2-score25-2 = 3 | RD2-score26-2 = 0

| RD2-team27 =  {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]| RD2-team28 = {{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]''' †
| RD2-score27-1 = 1 | RD2-score28-1 = 2
| RD2-score27-2 = 1 | RD2-score28-2 = 4

| RD2-team29 = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]''' | RD2-team30 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]] †
| RD2-score29-1 = 2 | RD2-score30-1 = 1
| RD2-score29-2 = 0 | RD2-score30-2 = 0

| RD2-team31 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' | RD2-team32 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]] †
| RD2-score31-1 = 1 | RD2-score32-1 = 1
| RD2-score31-2 = 3 | RD2-score32-2 = 2

<!-- Round of 16 -->
| RD3-team01 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]''' | RD3-team02 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]] †
| RD3-score01-1 = 2 | RD3-score02-1 = 1
| RD3-score01-2 = 4 | RD3-score02-2 = 0

| RD3-team03 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] | RD3-team04 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]''' †
| RD3-score03-1 = 0 | RD3-score04-1 = 1
| RD3-score03-2 = 1 | RD3-score04-2 = 2

| RD3-team05 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]''' | RD3-team06 = {{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]] †
| RD3-score05-1 = 2 | RD3-score06-1 = 0
| RD3-score05-2 = 2 | RD3-score06-2 = 0

| RD3-team07 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]''' | RD3-team08 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] †
| RD3-score07-1 = 0 | RD3-score08-1 = 0
| RD3-score07-2 = 2 | RD3-score08-2 = 0

| RD3-team09 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]''' † | RD3-team10 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] †
| RD3-score09-1 = 0 | RD3-score10-1 = 1
| RD3-score09-2 = 3 | RD3-score10-2 = 1

| RD3-team11 = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] † | RD3-team12 = {{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]'''
| RD3-score11-1 = 0 | RD3-score12-1 = 2
| RD3-score11-2 = 2 | RD3-score12-2 = 1

| RD3-team13 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]''' † | RD3-team14 = {{flagicon|Pará}} [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]
| RD3-score13-1 = 4 | RD3-score14-1 = 1
| RD3-score13-2 = 1 | RD3-score14-2 = 0

| RD3-team15 = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] | RD3-team16 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' †
| RD3-score15-1 = 1 | RD3-score16-1 = 1
| RD3-score15-2 = 1 | RD3-score16-2 = 2

<!-- Quarterfinals -->
| RD4-team01 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]''' | RD4-team02 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] †
| RD4-score01-1 = 2 | RD4-score02-1 = 2
| RD4-score01-2 = 2 | RD4-score02-2 = 0

| RD4-team03 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]''' | RD4-team04 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] †
| RD4-score03-1 = 2 | RD4-score04-1 = 1
| RD4-score03-2 = 2 | RD4-score04-2 = 0

| RD4-team05 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]''' † | RD4-team06 = {{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
| RD4-score05-1 = 2 | RD4-score06-1 = 0
| RD4-score05-2 = 2 | RD4-score06-2 = 2

| RD4-team07 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]''' | RD4-team08 = {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]] †
| RD4-score07-1 = 0 | RD4-score08-1 = 0
| RD4-score07-2 = 4 | RD4-score08-2 = 1

<!-- Semifinals -->
| RD5-team01 = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] †| RD5-team02 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''
| RD5-score01-1 = 0| RD5-score02-1 = 2
| RD5-score01-2 = 1| RD5-score02-2 = 1

| RD5-team03 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] †| RD5-team04 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]'''
| RD5-score03-1 = 1| RD5-score04-1 = 0
| RD5-score03-2 = 0| RD5-score04-2 = 2

<!-- Finals -->
| RD6-team01 = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]''' †| RD6-team02 = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
| RD6-score01-1 = 2| RD6-score02-1 = 0
| RD6-score01-2 = 1| RD6-score02-2 = 1
}}

==First phase==
{{expand section|date=July 2012}}

==Second phase==
{{expand section|date=July 2012}}

==Round of 16==
{{expand section|date=July 2012}}

==Quarterfinals==
{{expand section|date=July 2012}}

==Semifinals==
The Semifinals began on June 13 and ended on June 21.

===Group 61===
{{football box collapsible
|date=June 13
|time=21:50 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}}
|score=0–2
|report=[http://sumula.cbf.com.br/grpa130612s.pdf Report]
|team2={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
|goals1=
|goals2=[[Mazinho (footballer born 1987)|Mazinho]] {{goal|86}} <br> [[Hernán Barcos|Barcos]] {{goal|90}}
|stadium=[[Estádio Olímpico Monumental|Estádio Olímpico]], [[Porto Alegre]]
|attendance=43,508
|referee=Héber Roberto Lopes ([[Federação Paranaense de Futebol|Paraná]])
}}

{{football box collapsible
|date=June 21
|time=21:00 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] {{flagicon|São Paulo}}
|score= 1–1
|report=[http://sumula.cbf.com.br/pagr210612s.pdf Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]
|goals1=[[Jorge Valdivia|Valdivia]] {{goal|72}}
|goals2=[[Fernando Lucas Martins|Fernando]] {{goal|66}}
|stadium=[[Arena Barueri]], [[Barueri]]
|attendance= 26,255
|referee= Ricardo Marques Ribeiro ([[Federação Mineira de Futebol|Minas Gerais]])
}}
''Palmeiras advanced on points 4–1.''

===Group 62===
{{football box collapsible
|date=June 14
|time=21:00 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] {{flagicon|São Paulo}}
|score=1–0
|report=[http://sumula.cbf.com.br/saco140612s.pdf Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
|goals1=[[Lucas Rodrigues Moura da Silva|Lucas]] {{goal|88}}
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Estádio do Morumbi]], [[São Paulo]]
|attendance=40,448
|referee=Ricardo Marques Ribeiro ([[Federação Mineira de Futebol|Minas Gerais]])
}}

{{football box collapsible
|date=June 20
|time=21:50 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] {{flagicon|Paraná}}
|score= 2–0
|report=[http://sumula.cbf.com.br/cosa200612s.pdf Report]
|team2={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|goals1=[[Émerson Santos da Silva|Émerson]] {{goal|28}} <br>  [[Éverton Augusto de Barros Ribeiro|Éverton Ribeiro]] {{goal|61}}
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Estádio Couto Pereira|Estádio Major Antônio Couto Pereira]], [[Curitiba]]
|attendance=28,244
|referee=Wilton Pereira Sampaio ([[Federação Goiana de Futebol|Goiás]])
}}
''Tied on points 3–3, Coritiba advanced on better goal difference.''

==Finals==
The Finals was played on July 5 and July 11.

<big><big>'''Group 63'''</big></big>
{{football box
|date=July 5, 2012
|time=21:50 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] {{flagicon|São Paulo}}
|score=2 – 0
|report=[http://sumula.cbf.com.br/paco050712s.pdf Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
|goals1=[[Jorge Valdivia|Valdivia]] {{goal|45+2|pen.}}<br />[[Thiago Heleno]] {{goal|64}}
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Arena Barueri]], [[Barueri]]
|attendance=28,557
|referee=Wilton Pereira Sampaio ([[Federação Brasiliense de Futebol|Distrito Federal]])
}}
----
{{football box
|date=July 11, 2012
|time=21:50 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] {{flagicon|Paraná}}
|score=1 – 1
|report=[http://sumula.cbf.com.br/copa110712s.pdf Report]
|team2={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
|goals1=[[Ayrton Ganino|Ayrton]] {{goal|61}}
|goals2=[[Carlos Alberto Santos da Silva|Betinho]] {{goal|65}}
|stadium=[[Estádio Couto Pereira|Estádio Major Antônio Couto Pereira]], [[Curitiba]]
|attendance=31,382
|referee=Nielson Nogueira Dias ([[Federação Pernambucana de Futebol|Pernambuco]])
}}
''Palmeiras won on points 4–1.''

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto; width: 20%"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br>2012 Champion
|-
|{{flagicon|São Paulo|size=100px}}
|-
|'''[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''<br/>'''2nd title'''
|}

==Top goalscorers==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Rank
! Name
! Nationality
! Club
! Goals
|-
| style="text-align:center;" rowspan="1"| 1
|[[Luís Fabiano]]
|{{flag|BRA|name=Brazil}}
|[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|align=center| 8
|-
| style="text-align:center;" rowspan="1"| 2
|[[Joffre Guerrón]]
|{{flag|ECU|name=Ecuador}}
|[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]
|align=center| 7
|-
|}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20120408004328/http://www.copakiadobrasil.com.br/home/ Copa Kia do Brasil]
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20120625005848/http://cbf.com.br/competicoes/copa-do-brasil/2012 Copa do Brasil 2012], CBF.com
**[https://web.archive.org/web/20120523171603/http://www.cbf.com.br/media/351704/rec%20da%20copa%20do%20brasil%202012.pdf Official regulations] {{in lang|pt}}
*[https://int.soccerway.com/national/brazil/copa-do-brasil/2012/ Copa do Brasil], Soccerway.com

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}
{{2012 in Brazilian football}}
{{2012 in South American Football (CONMEBOL)}}

{{Use mdy dates|date=February 2011}}

<!----->

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2012}}
[[Category:2012 in domestic association football cups|Copa do Brasil]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2012]]
[[Category:2012 Brazilian football competitions|Copa do Brasil]]
